questions.question: Explain Event Bubbling to a junior developer.
questions.answer: Start with the problem it solves, show a simple example, explain core concepts, and discuss common mistakes.
questions.followUp: What mistakes do developers make with this?

questions.question: Performance implications of event bubbling?
questions.answer: Consider time/space complexity, memory usage, and optimization strategies.

questions.question: Real-world scenario for event bubbling?
questions.answer: Use Event Bubbling when you encounter the programming problem it addresses.
